brief_justification: Correctly identifies E4 and 2-fold increase matching ground truth, with a valid cascading-bottleneck caveat; traces second/third-order effects including the new E2 bottleneck emerging after E4 is fixed; explicitly names and rejects the frictionless/fast-enzyme reasoning pattern in the header and body; verifies the company's wrong proposal numerically (min stays 6) and re-verifies after E4 fix (min becomes 8); clearly distinguishes the minimum fold-increase required from whether that actually achieves the goal; evaluates and refutes the company's proposal with specific numbers, then identifies what further changes would be required; table, min() derivation, and post-fix recalculation all shown so any third party can reproduce; directly names and avoids the 'fastest step gives most improvement' anti-pattern that the negative gate targets; both suppressed modes—frictionless assumption and resistance blindness—are explicitly addressed in the reasoning context header; follows enumerate-rank-gate-diagnose topology structure matching S1→SORTED→C→S5 arc.
